verdict.answer_first: A wins: sentence 1 gives the bottom line, "your local machine has something the deploy environment doesn't"; B starts with a category list, "one of these."
verdict.decisiveness: B is tighter: its fastest prescription is "look at the exact module name" and split relative path vs package name; A spreads attention across 7 checks.
verdict.fabrication: Both use unverified frequency claims; A: "roughly in order of how often" and "#1"; B: "Almost always" and "single most common cause."
verdict.actionability: B is easier to act on first because it converts the error shape into diagnosis: "relative path → #1 or #4" and "package name → #2 or #3"; A has more commands but more branches.
